prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1KD-FTV 3.0L turbo-diesel (from Toyota Hilux/Prado) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a custom 5-inch oval muffler by HKS, and a Denso common-rail fuel system upgrade with 300cc injectors for 280hp and 550Nm torque

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Toyota Land Cruiser 70 Series 5-speed manual transmission swap, custom billet aluminum flywheel by Fidanza, and a South African-made Safari 4x4 transfer case with 4.88:1 gear ratios for extreme low-end torque delivery

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, custom 35mm front and 40mm rear sway bars by Whiteline, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity, paired with 17-inch Method MR701 wheels wrapped in 255/70R17 BFGoodrich KO2 tires
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Japanese-market Toyota HiAce Regius Super GL body kit (OEM Toyota part #00250-28040) with extended fiberglass fenders, custom carbon fiber side skirts, and a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (modified for HiAce chassis)

Front-end restomod with a custom billet aluminum grille featuring a laser-cut Toyota emblem, Hella Rallye 3000 Super White spotlights mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack by ARB, and a custom LED light bar integrated into the lower bumper by Rigid Industries

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (modified for HiAce mounting points), custom aluminum dashboard overlay by Varis, and a full roll cage by Custom Cages UK (designed specifically for the HiAce Super GL chassis) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline
